description: Validate medical terminology in a report: flag Joint Commission Do-Not-Use abbreviations, ambiguous abbreviations, and detect ICD-10 codes (read-only).
rules: read-only — never edits the input report
flags prohibited abbreviations (U, IU, QD, QOD, MS, MSO4, MgSO4) and ambiguous ones (cc, hs, SC, OD, ...)
detects strings matching the ICD-10-CM code format
usage: Set REPORT_FILE (a clinical report .md). Output: terminology.json.
limitation: Word-boundary regex only; abbreviation matching is case-sensitive for the Do-Not-Use list and ICD-10 detection is format-only (not a code lookup). Requires python3 (stdlib only).
